Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to update a given DECLARE model dictionary by adding new constraints to mitigate bias in a loan application review process I need to Identify potential bias eg decisions directly following sensitive attribute checks Add new constraints coexistence response succession non succession etc to mitigate this bias Preserve the format of the DECLARE dictionary Document the additions and provide a rationale

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets invent some activities related to sensitive attributes and bias mitigation CheckApplicantRace CheckApplicantGender BiasMitigationCheck ManualReview Approve Reject RequestAdditionalInfo

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait the original model has StartApplication FinalDecision RequestAdditionalInfo I can add constraints involving these and new activities or just use the existing ones if I assume they represent the sensitive checks But the prompt says eg CheckApplicantRace so I can introduce these activity names in the constraints

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets add the following constraints response CheckApplicantRace to BiasMitigationCheck Whenever race is checked a bias mitigation check must follow precedence BiasMitigationCheck to FinalDecision Before a final decision is made a bias mitigation check must have occurred coexistence ManualReview to FinalDecision If a manual review happens a final decision must also happen or vice versa Lets do FinalDecision to ManualReview to ensure manual review coexists with final decision for sensitive cases Actually coexistence means if A occurs B occurs and if B occurs A occurs Lets make ManualReview and FinalDecision coexist nonchainsuccession CheckApplicantRace to Reject Reject cannot immediately follow CheckApplicantRace existence BiasMitigationCheck Ensure it happens at least once

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets refine the constraints to fit the exact format

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Wait coexistence in DECLARE means if A occurs B occurs and if B occurs A occurs The format in the prompt maps activity to another activitys dictionary So ManualReview FinalDecision support 1 0 confidence 1 0 is correct

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Explanation existence of BiasMitigationCheck Ensures that every trace includes a bias mitigation check response from CheckApplicantRace to BiasMitigationCheck Whenever an applicants race is checked a bias mitigation check must eventually follow precedence from BiasMitigationCheck to FinalDecision Ensures that a bias mitigation check must occur before any final decision is made coexistence of ManualReview and FinalDecision Ensures that manual review and final decision always appear together in the trace adding human oversight to decisions nonchainsuccession from CheckApplicantRace to Reject Prevents a rejection from immediately following a race check mitigating direct automated bias

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This looks solid and directly addresses the prompts requirements
